from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_price():
    items = [
        {'name': 'A', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'C', 'price': 150}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    
    assert len(result) == 1, f"Expected exactly 1 item with price > {threshold}, got {len(result)}"
    assert result[0] == {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}, f"Expected item B with string price '200'"
